title: oberonia labidoglossa
intro: Oberonia labidoglossa, also known as the labio-glossed orchid, is a species of orchid native to India and Southeast Asia. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Oberonia labidoglossa include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems such as bronchitis and asthma. Oberonia labidoglossa can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
